text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I lost again...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Big Bro... Can I run some more before I go
home today?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Big Sis... Can I run some more before I go
home today?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I am, but more importantly...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I have to be the cutest at all times!
choice_data_list: That's exactly why you need to rest.

Then I guess we'll have to do some special
training!

Then I guess we'll have to do some special
training!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I have to be the cutest at all times!
choice_data_list: That's exactly why you need to rest.

Then I guess we'll have to do some special
training!

Then I guess we'll have to do some special
training!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Whaaat...
choice_data_list:
Not just for the next race, but so we can keep
going in the long run.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, so that's what this is all about, huh? Do
you really wanna stay with me that long?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, so that's what this is all about, huh? Do
you really wanna stay with me that long?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Well, if you insist... I guess I'll go rest. But that's
not all I'm gonna do.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Well, if you insist... I guess I'll go rest. But that's
not all I'm gonna do.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna charge my cuteness up to the max while
I rest so I can be at my cutest in all my races from
now on!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: How's that sound? Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Curren Chan properly allows herself to
rest in preparation for her next race.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ehehe. We sure will. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
No matter what training you have for me, I'll
power through it with my cuteness!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: So, Big Bro, I want you...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: So, Big Sis, I want you...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
To keep pushing me forward and watching me
run.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna get so cute that you won't look away
for even a second! Hehe. ♪
